category_sources: source_facts.description says file conversion utility for older formats; official homepage describes decoding files, converting to modern/readable formats, and extracting embedded files.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub README heading use Deark; source_facts.name is deark.
docs_sources: Official homepage has a Documentation section; linked official GitHub repository contains readme.md and technical.md documentation files.
repo_sources: Official homepage links 'GitHub project page: Deark' to jsummers/deark; source_facts.repo was empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official homepage and GitHub README describe decoding file formats, conversion, metadata inspection, and embedded file extraction.
